assertionResults.fullName: Security: RLS & Access Control Anonymous Access should NOT list any tasks for anonymous user (Direct Select)
assertionResults.title: should NOT list any tasks for anonymous user (Direct Select)

assertionResults.fullName: Security: RLS & Access Control Anonymous Access should NOT be able to create a task (Expect PGRST205 or PGRST301)
assertionResults.title: should NOT be able to create a task (Expect PGRST205 or PGRST301)

assertionResults.fullName: Security: RLS & Access Control Anonymous Access should NOT be able to see project_members list
assertionResults.title: should NOT be able to see project_members list

assertionResults.fullName: Security: RLS & Access Control Invite Logic (RPC) should fail to get details for invalid token
assertionResults.title: should fail to get details for invalid token

assertionResults.fullName: Security: RLS & Access Control Invite Logic (RPC) should successfully get details for a VALID token
assertionResults.title: should successfully get details for a VALID token

assertionResults.fullName: Security: RLS & Access Control Authenticated Access should NOT be able to spoof creator ID on new project
assertionResults.title: should NOT be able to spoof creator ID on new project
